description: This file contains unit tests for the ScrollBar helper class, testing scrollbar visibility, width calculations, and style adjustments when hiding and resetting scrollbars in various scenarios.

classes.name: ScrollBarHelper
classes.description: A helper class for managing scrollbar visibility, width calculations, and style adjustments when scrollbars are shown or hidden.

methods.name: isOverflowing
methods.description: Checks if the document body is overflowing vertically, indicating the presence of a scrollbar.

methods.name: getWidth
methods.description: Calculates the width of the scrollbar.

methods.name: hide
methods.description: Hides the scrollbar and adjusts inline styles of fixed and sticky elements accordingly.

methods.name: reset
methods.description: Restores inline styles and attributes to their original state after scrollbar adjustments.
